pretest.stem: 30 fingers are on 5 hands? No — 5 fingers per hand. How many people have 30 fingers total?

learn.title: Dividing by 5
learn.content: Count by 5s to find the quotient. 35 ÷ 5: count 5,10,15,20,25,30,35 — 7 counts. So 35 ÷ 5 = 7.

hints: Think about what divide by 5 means.
Try drawing a picture or using a number line.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is C. Remember how divide by 5 works.

try.stem: A teacher gives 5 stars to each student. She used 30 stars. How many students?

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is B. Remember how divide by 5 works.
